overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a grand medieval great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candles, long dining tables with seated figures, high vaulted ceilings, and large stained glass windows. The scene is rendered in a game engine with high-quality global illumination and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand gothic dining hall with floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary camera holding a wide establishing shot of the great hall

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall with colorful panes
massive stone column and arch structure framing the left side
massive stone column and arch structure framing the right side
rows of long wooden dining tables with benches and seated figures
high gothic vaulted ceiling with wooden beams and stone ribs

segments.scene_description: A static wide shot captures the interior of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles and natural light filtering through a massive stained glass window. Long dining tables fill the center space with seated figures dining, while massive stone columns frame the sides of the hall. The camera remains stationary throughout, presenting a cinematic view of the atmospheric space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand gothic great hall that maintains a consistent atmosphere of medieval majesty. It begins with a wide perspective of the interior, where hundreds of floating candles cast a warm glow across the vast space. As the eye wanders through the scene, natural light filters through a massive stained glass window, illuminating the long dining tables and the figures seated within. The view remains steady, framing the central activity between massive stone columns that stretch toward the high vaulted ceilings. Finally, the composition settles into a balanced display of atmospheric lighting and architectural scale.
